name: Chia-Offer
tagline: Turn any Chia offer file into a short, shareable link with rich asset details and real-time status.
description:
Chia-Offer turns any Chia offer file into a **short, shareable link** with rich asset details, icons, and real-time status tracking. Paste an offer string, get a short URL whose landing page shows exactly what you pay and what you receive — with high-quality asset icons, complete token metadata, and verification status.

## How it works

- **Paste offer** — copy your Chia offer string into the form.
- **Auto parse** — the [Dexie.space](https://dexie.space) API instantly parses the offer and extracts every asset.
- **Enrich** — [SpaceScan](https://spacescan.io) adds asset metadata, icons, and verification status.
- **Share** — get a short link with complete offer details and live tracking.

## Built for sharing

- Share links carry a rich preview image that unfurls automatically on Twitter/X, Telegram, and Discord.
- QR codes for any offer, plus one-click copy of the raw offer string.
- Real-time offer status — active, completed, or expired — with views, shares, and expiry at a glance.
- Complex multi-component bundles are flagged honestly, with a direct path to inspect them on Dexie.space.

Chia-Offer is itself published on the DIG Network — the site is served from an on-chain-anchored store at `chia-offer.on.dig.net`.
